mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `bank`.`card` ( user_id, account_id, card_name, card_number, card_type, cvc, status, valid_thru, credit_limit, used_amount, payment_day,card_color,issued_at ) VALUES ( #{card.userId}, #{card.accountId}, #{card.cardName}, #{card.cardNumber}, #{card.cardType}, #{card.cvc}, #{card.status}, #{card.validThru}, #{card.creditLimit}, #{card.usedAmount}, #{card.paymentDay},#{card.cardColor},IFNULL(#{card.issuedAt}, NOW()) )
mapper.select: SELECT card_id AS cardId, user_id AS userId, account_id AS accountId, card_name AS cardName, CONCAT('****-****-****-', RIGHT(REPLACE(card_number, '-', ''), 4)) AS cardNumber, card_type AS cardType, NULL AS cvc, status AS status, valid_thru AS validThru, credit_limit AS creditLimit, used_amount AS usedAmount, payment_day AS paymentDay, card_color AS cardColor, issued_at AS issuedAt FROM `bank`.`card` WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY issued_at DESC

SELECT card_id AS cardId, user_id AS userId, account_id AS accountId, card_name AS cardName, CONCAT('****-****-****-', RIGHT(REPLACE(card_number, '-', ''), 4)) AS cardNumber, card_type AS cardType, NULL AS cvc, status AS status, valid_thru AS validThru, credit_limit AS creditLimit, used_amount AS usedAmount, payment_day AS paymentDay, card_color AS cardColor, issued_at AS issuedAt FROM `bank`.`card` WHERE card_id = #{cardId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM `bank`.`card` WHERE card_id = #{cardId} AND user_id = #{userId}
